classification.current: canonical metadata, one explicitly accepted working chapter version, or a uniquely selected highest observed chapter version
classification.legacy: accepted transition format or a superseded lower chapter version
classification.ambiguous: missing/conflicting identity or version; no silent choice was made

TASK_CODEX_0006 — Synchronize Relationship Capital Decision
Ostrom eight design principles require page-level primary verification
50/76/40 percent high-trust-organization statistic requires original source and context
Google Project Aristotle claims depend on secondary reporting
Scale-free network claims require direct measurement before application to small client networks
Macnamara listening-resource figures require primary-text checking
Arnstein participation ladder has a public-to-private transfer limit
Advice trust and communication networks are an applied mapping method not an exhaustive taxonomy
Cynefin domains are a bounded sensemaking framework not empirically fixed categories
Rogers adopter percentages do not predict a specific organization
Barcelona Principles are a professional consensus standard not a causal model
Theory of change is methodological guidance not a validated predictive model
Peter Baehr community-of-fate attribution lacks a verified primary publication
Collective capacity is an interpretive umbrella rather than a source-defined construct
